arts.ttl: Serie A | Inter v Como: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: As Inter Milan gears up to face Como in their upcoming Serie A fixture, manager Simone Inzaghi is set to recall his star players after rotating the squad in Thursday's match. The formidable attacking duo of Marcus Thuram and Lautaro Martinez is expected to lead the line, with Mehdi Taremi and Marko Arnautovic making way. arts.ttl: De Vrij: “The future? It’s up to Inter. I’m happy here”
arts.sum: Stefan De Vrij is experiencing a resurgence in form as he steps up to replace Francesco Acerbi in the Inter Milan defence. The Dutch defender has been delivering high-level performances, and although his contract is set to expire at the end of the season, he remains optimistic about his future with the club.
